_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-15 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 3/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1407.7 is above EMA18 (1382.2) and EMA50 (1341.48) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (26.29) is below its signal line (27.62) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (nan) and resistance (nan) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 1.96%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations.
